Video.summary: Bob paints a gentle stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Scenic Seclusion

Video.title: Meadow Brook Surprise

Video.title: Waterfall in the Woods

Video.summary: Snowy peaks loom behind a clear lake.

Video.title: Graceful Mountains

Video.summary: Mountains nestle in snowy clouds.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain River

Video.summary: Bob uses blue tones to paint waves at night.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Oval Essence

Video.summary: Bob Ross demonstrates how to create a mountain landscape illuminated by the moonlight; using careful brushstrokes, Bob brings this peaceful vista to life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Moonlight Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter fantasy land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowy Solitude

Video.summary: Storm waves pummel a grassy shore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Windy Waves

Video.summary: Bob paints a valley and mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Valley of Tranquility

Video.title: Little Home in the Meadow

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

Video.summary: Bob paints a calm mountain lake.

Video.title: Mirrored Images

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a quaint forest cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: New Day's Dawn

Video.title: Pretty Autumn Day

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin in frigid mountains.

Video.title: Teton Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a pond amid dense foliage.

Video.title: Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints ocean waves rolling ashore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Surf's Up

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Pine

Video.summary: Bob paints sky, stream and snowy peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
